title: About the use of new format A.TR and disposal of old format A.TRs
bodyHtml:
According to the letter received from the Turkish Exporters Assembly, it has been stated that the date previously set as January 1, 2024, for the commencement of using the term "Turkey" on the proof of origin and movement documents except for box 4 of the A.TR Movement Certificate will now be March 31, 2024, due to the excessive stock of previously obtained documents, as agreed upon with the European Commission.

According to the notification from the Ministry of Trade, it is stated that as of March 31, 2024, the term "Türkiye" will appear in places other than box 4, and in box 4, the term "European Economic Community" will be replaced by "European Community".

In this context, to ensure that there are no problems in exports to the European Union (EU), it is crucial that as of March 31, 2024, exporters or their legal representatives who are entitled to use the A.TR Movement Certificate in Simplified Procedure dispose of the old format simplified A.TR certificates in stock by destruction. It is emphasized that the A.TR certificates printed in the old format will be deactivated for use in electronic form (MEDOS) by the Turkish Exporters Assembly, and as of March 31, 2024, the old format A.TR Movement Certificates will not be valid for exports to EU countries.
